prompts.name: Modern Minimalist
prompts.text: Use modern minimalist architecture with clean lines, open space, glass, concrete, and calm geometric balance.

prompts.name: Traditional Japanese
prompts.text: Use traditional Japanese architecture with wooden beams, tatami, sliding doors, tiled roofs, and refined natural harmony.

prompts.name: Gothic Architecture
prompts.text: Use gothic architecture with pointed arches, stained glass, tall columns, carved stone, and dramatic vertical beauty.

prompts.name: Art Nouveau
prompts.text: Use art nouveau architecture with flowing organic lines, floral motifs, curved glass, and ornamental elegance.

prompts.name: Victorian
prompts.text: Use Victorian architecture with ornate trim, decorative windows, rich materials, and historical character.

prompts.name: Brutalist
prompts.text: Use brutalist architecture with heavy concrete, bold geometric shapes, strong shadows, and monumental presence.

prompts.name: Futuristic
prompts.text: Use futuristic architecture with sleek materials, curved structures, luminous panels, and advanced urban design.

prompts.name: Cozy Cottage
prompts.text: Use cozy cottage architecture with warm wood, stone details, flower boxes, and inviting domestic charm.

prompts.name: Luxury Penthouse
prompts.text: Use a luxury penthouse interior with floor-to-ceiling windows, premium materials, city views, and refined design.

prompts.name: Glass Greenhouse
prompts.text: Use a glass greenhouse with plants, transparent walls, warm natural light, and botanical atmosphere.

prompts.name: Industrial Loft
prompts.text: Use industrial loft architecture with exposed brick, metal beams, large windows, and raw urban texture.

prompts.name: Moroccan Courtyard
prompts.text: Use Moroccan courtyard architecture with patterned tiles, arches, fountains, and warm decorative color.

prompts.name: Ancient Roman
prompts.text: Use ancient Roman architecture with columns, marble floors, arches, and classical grandeur.

prompts.name: Floating City
prompts.text: Use fantasy floating-city architecture with suspended platforms, bridges, towers, and clouds below.

prompts.name: Underwater Architecture
prompts.text: Use underwater architecture with domed glass, coral integration, blue filtered light, and aquatic atmosphere.
